title: Client Analytics Agent Configuration
description: Per-client configuration for the analytics agent pipeline

client_id.description: Unique slug matching vault folder name

credentials_file.description: Path to service account JSON inside Docker container
Path to service account JSON (can be same as GA4)

tier.description: GTM tier - affects workspace limit logic

base_path.description: Root path for client analytics files in vault

event_spec.description: Path to the event spec JSON file

implementation_dir.description: Directory for PRDs and GTM changelogs

channel.description: Primary Slack channel for this client

approvers.description: Slack usernames who can approve GTM changes

aeo_tracking_enabled.description: When true, the gap-analyzer system prompt is augmented with LLM-traffic context (AI referrer regex, ai_referral event scaffold guidance). Read by build-gap-analysis-prompt.js and the GTM Implementer's AEO scaffold builder.

anomaly_detection.description: Knobs for the GA4 Monitor's anomaly detection logic in compare-events.js. Defaults are conservative; tune per client tolerance for noise.

method.description: binary = legacy (prev>100 -> now=0); rolling_zscore = multi-baseline (rolling 7d + same-day-last-week + same-day-4-weeks-ago); auto = use rolling_zscore if enough history, else binary

min_history_days.description: Minimum days of history required to enable rolling_zscore. Below this, falls back to binary or skips anomaly detection.

z_threshold.description: Absolute z-score threshold for the rolling baseline. Values above this trigger one of the three baseline flags.

drop_floor_pct.description: Minimum percentage drop vs same-day-last-week or same-day-4-weeks-ago to trigger those baseline flags.

gap_analysis.description: Per-client overrides for the GA4 Gap Analyzer's Claude API request. Read by build-gap-analysis-prompt.js. Useful for A/B testing model variants without code changes.

model.description: Anthropic model identifier (e.g., claude-opus-4-6, claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6). Defaults to claude-opus-4-6 if unset.

max_tokens.description: Max output tokens for gap analysis. Account for adaptive thinking budget. Defaults to 16384 if unset.
